articles.title: Presidential Candidate Kamala Harris Adds Ex-Binance Adviser to Campaign Team: Report
articles.description: Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris is reportedly adding an ex-Binance adviser to her campaign team. According to a new report by Politico, the Harris campaign has hired David Plouffe – an ex-political advisor to former President Barack Obama who once served on Binance’s Global Advisory Board.
